title: NPR: NATO summit set to begin in Turkey

title: Notes on Freedom: America's Most Powerful Voices on the Nation’s Enduring Values

title: The Decisive Theater: North Korea And The Problem Of Simultaneous War
summary: Western analysts fixate on North Korea’s missiles. The real danger is speed — a mass artillery-and-missile salvo in the war’s first hours, backed by 1.2 million troops and tactical nuclear weapons. And if Europe, the Middle East, and Taiwan ignite at the same moment, Korea stops being a sideshow and becomes the tipping point.

title: Chapter Eight AI And War Automating Escalation?
summary: Artificial intelligence may once have been science fiction, but it is now increasingly a part of modern combat: from targeting to early warning and even the employment of modern weapons. It is used to synthesize troves of videos and images, to develop electronic warfare tactics, to navigate, and to streamline targeting and campaign planning.

title: Trump's EEOC abandons key tool for combating workplace discrimination
